name: The Experience
about: The Experience is a premier indoor venue in Hauppauge, New York, featuring state-of-the-art multi-sport simulators and versatile event spaces. The facility offers a comprehensive golf experience with high-tech simulators designed for accuracy and realism, alongside a full-service restaurant and multiple banquet rooms suitable for gatherings of all sizes. Simulators are available for both individual and group play, with a pricing model based on hourly bay reservations. The venue is tailored for events ranging from corporate functions and private parties to casual practice sessions, providing a blend of sophisticated entertainment and premium technology.
why_golfers_like_it: Premier indoor simulators designed for accuracy and realism
Comprehensive golf experience with 18 holes playable in one hour
Pro-rated pricing system based on actual time spent on the bay
Versatile facility suitable for both casual play and serious practice
Multiple private rooms and event spaces for group outings

food_and_drink.notes: On-site restaurant Bistro 180 and Sim Alley menu available; full catering and off-site services provided
Not explicitly mentioned; BYOB policy not confirmed

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The Experience provides all necessary equipment for simulator use; no need to bring your own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks are not mentioned; the venue has an on-site restaurant and catering services available.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: You can complete 18 holes in approximately one hour on the simulators, with the option to extend your time for group play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, The Experience hosts children's events like the SCPD Kids Night Out and offers private spaces suitable for family gatherings.
